hero.name: Ernesto Sola-Thomas
hero.title: Silicon Engineer · Founder
hero.tagline: Building Huitzo — an AI intelligence platform for enterprise. Microsoft silicon engineer with the technical depth to make it real.
statements: Founder of Huitzo: intelligence-as-a-service that gives organizations real AI depth, not demos.
Silicon verification engineer at Microsoft — AI chip infrastructure, formal verification, and systems depth.

buildingNow.label: Building Now
buildingNow.name: Huitzo
buildingNow.oneliner: An intelligence platform turning advanced AI into enterprise outcomes. Early-stage, serious architecture.

disclaimer: I am employed by Microsoft. My personal projects and ventures are independent, conducted outside my Microsoft role. I do not use Microsoft resources or confidential information, and I do not represent Microsoft in these activities.
